title: Government Type
Description
Examples (Countries)
table-461-461.caption: How many type of governments are in Africa?
data: A system where the president is both head of state and head of government, elected independently of the legislature.
A system where the president is head of state, but the prime minister is head of government and accountable to the parliament.
A system where a monarch is head of state, but their powers are limited by a constitution and an elected parliament.
A temporary government established during a period of political instability or conflict, often leading to elections.
A system where power is concentrated in the hands of a single person or a small group, with limited political freedom.
